recap: Created colors-build script that parses kitty/config/colors.conf and writes dist/colors.zsh (typeset -gA colors) and dist/colors.json; added NeoVim trigger in colors.lua.
Moved colors-load-definitions from autoload/project/ to new autoload/colors/ domain; updated guard to check colors array population and source path to dist/colors.zsh.

Created colors-template-render autoload function that replaces {{NAME}} and {{NAME:hex}} placeholders using the colors[] array; migrated oroshi.xml, rgrc.conf, and gitconfig templates from $COLOR_* to {{}} syntax; updated three generate scripts to use colors-template-render instead of envsubst.

Removed colors-load-definitions call and buildColorMap() from projects-build; now reads dist/colors.json directly via --argjson colors; updated bats fixture to write dist/colors.json instead of mocking COLOR_* env vars.
Replaced getEnvColors() (COLORS_INDEX + COLOR_*_HEXA env vars) with getColors() that reads dist/colors.json via F.readJson(); added nil guard for missing file.

Migrated all $COLOR_* references to $colors[] in 11 files: 6 prompt files, 5 tool/completion files; updated git.bats tests to source dist/colors.zsh and check $colors[KEY]; also updated commented-out examples in ls.zsh and styling.zsh.

Migrated $COLOR_* refs to $COLORS[kebab-name] in statusbar-cpu, statusbar-ram, statusbar-ping, colorize, git-branch-color, and statusline; replaced source of env/colors.zsh with colors-load-definitions in standalone scripts; updated git-branch-color tests to use $COLORS[kebab] keys.
Updated colors-refresh to call colors-build and source dist/colors.zsh; deleted legacy src/env-generate-colors and env/colors.zsh.

Renamed colors array to COLORS and converted all keys from UPPERCASE_SNAKE to kebab-case across colors-build, colors-load-definitions, colors-template-render, template source files, prompt/tool files, projects-list.zsh, src/projects.json, and projects-build jq logic; regenerated dist files.
